summary: Phase 9 bug fixes verification complete. All requested features verified: 1) Commission Rules Add/Edit form working correctly with all fields including Manager Override Bounds, 2) Manager Portal My Commissions sidebar shows 'My Commissions' with DollarSign icon, 3) Stats cards use DollarSign icons, 4) Empty state message updated, 5) Override button logic correct - only shows when rule has override bounds.
passed_tests: Commission Rules page loads correctly with stats cards
Add Rule button opens modal successfully
Add Rule modal has Manager Override Bounds fields (Min/Max %)
Manager Portal sidebar shows 'My Commissions' with DollarSign icon
Manager My Commissions page loads correctly
Stats cards show DollarSign icons (Pending Validation, Pending Approval, Approved/Payable, Paid Total)
Empty state message shows: 'No commissions yet. Commissions will appear here once your team's enrollments are paid in full.'
Override button logic verified - only shows for commissions with rule_min !== null && rule_max !== null
critical_code_review_comments: Commission Rules form correctly includes Manager Override Bounds fields
DollarSign icon imported and used correctly in ManagerPortal.jsx for sidebar nav and stats cards
Empty state message is user-friendly and explains when commissions will appear
Override button correctly conditional on both pending status AND rule bounds being set
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested with existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 9 bug fixes verified. Commission Rules Add/Edit form working, Manager My Commissions page has DollarSign icons and correct empty state. Override button only shows for commissions with rule bounds set. No commissions exist for manager user so empty state is displayed correctly.

mocked_integrations.stripe: MOCKED - Stripe payments in mock mode
mocked_integrations.gohighlevel: MOCKED - GoHighLevel notifications in mock mode

commission_rules_form.manager_override_bounds: Min Override % and Max Override % fields present

manager_my_commissions.sidebar_icon: DollarSign icon used for 'My Commissions' nav item
manager_my_commissions.stats_cards_icons: All 4 stats cards use DollarSign icon
manager_my_commissions.empty_state_message: No commissions yet. Commissions will appear here once your team's enrollments are paid in full.
manager_my_commissions.override_button_logic: Shows only when status is pending AND rule_min and rule_max are not null
